creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter:  How do you mean "won't work"?  Does FreeBSD boot 
at all on them?  If so, can you please provide the output of 
"pciconf -lv" and "dmesg"?  Also, please try FreeBSD 7.1, it 
supports more hardware than FreeBSD 7.0.
